review.note: New spatial primitive — approved during ring redesign.

candidates.concept: encircling; going in a circle; again
candidates.plain_description: encircling; going in a circle; again
candidates.primitive_test_note: Maximally generative: spin=move+around, again=do+around, surround=outside+around, orbit=move+far+around, cycle=time+around, return=move+around+here, wrap=hold+around. No existing primitives combine to express circular/cyclical spatial relation.

candidates.reason: forward — basic everyday idea that deserves its own root.

review.note: New spatial primitive — approved during ring redesign.

candidates.primitive_test_note: Spatial orientation primitive. Gives: ahead=front+path, face=turn front toward, approach=move toward front, in-front-of=front+place. Before/after are temporal-only; front/back fill the spatial orientation gap.

candidates.reason: behind — basic everyday idea that deserves its own root.

review.note: New spatial primitive — approved during ring redesign.

candidates.primitive_test_note: Spatial orientation primitive — the complement of front. Gives: behind=back+place, backward=move+back, avoid=go+back+from. Also covers the sense of returning (going back to where you were).

candidates.reason: through — basic everyday idea that deserves its own root.

review.note: New spatial primitive — approved during ring redesign.

candidates.concept: through; passing from one side to the other
candidates.plain_description: through; passing from one side to the other
candidates.primitive_test_note: Traversal primitive. Gives: cross=move+through, pierce=push+through, tunnel=path+through+earth, transparent=see+through, enter=move+through+inside, understand=know+through.

philosophy.premise: Concepts are canonical. Sounds are editorial proposals until approved.
philosophy.workflow: meaning cleanup → primitive test → priority class → sound generation → distinctiveness + collision + boundary scoring → human approval → compounds
